accuracy_notice.warning: Cuneiform signs may be INCORRECT for actual Akkadian/Ugaritic texts
accuracy_notice.recommendation: Verify against ORACC and CDLI before any academic use
scholarly_sources: George, A.R. (2003). The Babylonian Gilgamesh Epic. Oxford University Press.
Lambert, W.G. (2013). Babylonian Creation Myths. Eisenbrauns.
Foster, B.R. (2005). Before the Muses. CDL Press.
digital_editions: https://etcsl.orinst.ox.ac.uk/ (Electronic Text Corpus of Sumerian Literature)

tablets.text_ak: 𒋗 𒀝 𒉪 𒁍 𒊏 𒅗
tablets.note: VERIFY: Compare with George 2003, Tablet I, Line 1
VERIFY: Compare with George 2003, Tablet I, Line 2

verification_required.cuneiform_signs: Requires Assyriologist verification against CDLI sign lists
verification_required.transliteration: Requires comparison with Chicago Assyrian Dictionary
verification_required.translation: Multiple translations exist - compare George, Foster, Lambert
verification_required.dating: Old Babylonian vs. Standard Babylonian versions differ significantly
